rubric_metadata.name: TypeScript/React Governance Best Practices
rubric_metadata.description: Framework-focused rubric for TypeScript/React systems including API integration governance.

dimensions.name: Typed UI State Integrity
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Validate strict typing for run state, responses, and runtime configuration fields.
dimensions.judicial_logic: Untyped dynamic payload paths should be scored low.

dimensions.name: API Integration Reliability
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Check authenticated calls, polling behavior, and terminal status handling.
dimensions.judicial_logic: Missing error-state handling caps score at 2.

dimensions.name: Governance Operability
dimensions.forensic_instruction: Verify operator controls for model/provider/rubric configuration.
dimensions.judicial_logic: If runtime governance controls are absent, score cannot exceed 3.
